certificates.census_statement: For every level omega' >= 14: no prime-complete pair (m, m+1) with m <= 10^14.0 exists.  Each surviving class has exactly one member <= B (B < M), every such member was checked for intrinsic prime-completeness, and none passed.  Independent of storage caps; hereditary by refinement.
certificates.heredity_lemma: Adding the (omega+1)-th prime's congruence refines every class, so class minima are nondecreasing in omega and any certificate at omega_0 holds for all omega >= omega_0 at the same bound.
